ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (male/female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (0 = did not survive, 1 = survived) */,
  "passenger_class" TEXT /* Class of the passenger (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "embarked_port" TEXT /* Port where the passenger embarked */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin assigned to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., captain, officer, engineer) */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship the crew member is assigned to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the crew member */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the crew member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the crew member was hired */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date when the crew member left the company (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "passenger_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity of the ship */,
  "crew_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum crew capacity of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of the ship (e.g., cruise, cargo, ferry) */,
  "build_year" INTEGER /* Year the ship was built */,
  "flag_country" TEXT /* Country under which the ship is registered */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ship in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the ship in meters */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship making the voyage */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Port of departure */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Port of arrival */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "route_description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "estimated_arrival_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of arrival */,
  "actual_arrival_date" TEXT /* Actual date of arrival */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the voyage (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Total weight of the cargo on board */,
  "cargo_description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin assigned to the ticket */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the ticket (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was booked */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship the cabin is on */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "deck_number" INTEGER /* Deck number of the cabin */,
  "cabin_description" TEXT /* Description of the cabin (e.g., amenities, view) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabins_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_voyages" (
  "passenger_voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger-voyage combination */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "boarding_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger boarded the ship */,
  "disembarkation_time" TEXT /* Time when the passenger disembarked the ship */,
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabin assigned to the passenger for the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyages_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyages_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyages_cabin_id FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_id") REFERENCES cabins ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  "assignment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the crew member was assigned to the ship/voyage */,
  "assignment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the crew member's assignment ended */,
  "duties" TEXT /* Description of the duties assigned to the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_assignments_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, crew, passenger) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
